summary: Replayed ADR 0245 from the exact committed 0.177.65 mainline candidate by converging the shared API gateway and interactive ops portal on docker-runtime-lv3, publishing the declared-to-live service attestation contract through the authenticated gateway surfaces, and re-verifying both the internal portal runtime and the public edges while preserving the current mainline platform baseline.

verification.observed: uv run --with pytest --with fastapi==0.116.1 --with httpx==0.28.1 --with uvicorn==0.35.0 --with pyyaml==6.0.2 --with cryptography==45.0.6 --with jinja2==3.1.5 --with itsdangerous==2.2.0 --with python-multipart==0.0.20 pytest -q tests/test_declared_live_attestation.py tests/test_api_gateway.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py returned 43 passed in 8.07s, python3 -m py_compile platform/runtime_assurance/declared_live_attestation.py scripts/declared_live_attestation.py scripts/api_gateway/main.py scripts/ops_portal/app.py scripts/ops_portal/runtime_assurance.py passed, and make syntax-check-api-gateway plus make syntax-check-ops-portal both passed.

make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-api-gateway and make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-ops-portal passed from the isolated worktree, ./scripts/validate_repo.sh shell passed after the SC2295 fix in scripts/validate_repo.sh, and ./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards plus uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate both passed on the final 0.177.65 candidate.

make converge-api-gateway env=production ANSIBLE_TRACE_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true' completed successfully from source commit 0f9fad63d9a32a4723fdfdcbb7f0bb363e8df4ed with recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=242 changed=111 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=35 rescued=0 ignored=0.

make converge-ops-portal env=production ANSIBLE_TRACE_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true' completed successfully from source commit 0f9fad63d9a32a4723fdfdcbb7f0bb363e8df4ed with recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=129 changed=17 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14 rescued=0 ignored=0.

HEAD https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/attestation returned HTTP/2 401 without a bearer token, GET https://api.lv3.org/healthz returned HTTP/2 200 with {"status":"ok"}, authenticated GET https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/attestation returned HTTP/2 200 with a 44-service production summary, and authenticated GET https://api.lv3.org/v1/platform/attestation/api_gateway returned HTTP/2 200 with service_id=api_gateway and status=attested.

verification.check: Ops portal internal and public verification
verification.observed: From docker-runtime-lv3 reached through the current Proxmox jump path, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/health returned HTTP/1.1 200 with {"status":"ok"}, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/ returned HTTP/1.1 200 and still contained Runtime Assurance, GET http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/overview returned HTTP/1.1 200 and still contained Runtime Assurance, GET https://ops.lv3.org/health returned HTTP/2 200 with {"status":"ok"}, and HEAD https://ops.lv3.org/ returned HTTP/2 302 redirecting to /oauth2/sign_in as expected for the protected operator shell.

make validate progressed past the earlier config/ansible-role-idempotency.yml blocker once harbor_runtime was added to the tracked-role registry, then exited with seven unrelated ansible-lint warnings in collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/control_plane_recovery/defaults/main.yml, collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/monitoring_vm/tasks/main.yml, collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/openbao_runtime/defaults/main.yml, and collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform/roles/windmill_runtime/{defaults/main.yml,tasks/main.yml}. The wrapper still completed the downstream idempotency, shell, JSON, compose runtime env guard, and retry guard steps before returning exit 1.

notes: This exact-main receipt is the first canonical live-apply evidence for ADR 0245 and records the replay from the committed 0.177.65 candidate after 0.177.64 had already been consumed by ADR 0240 mainline integration.
The verified mainline platform baseline remained 0.130.46 during this replay; the release cut records ADR 0245 in repo truth without claiming a new platform version bump.
The ops-portal recovery runbook was updated in the same branch because the older hardcoded Proxmox jump address no longer matched the live management path discovered during verification.
